s1.ptxt: Remove battery and battery tray with ECM.
Shift select lever to N range and remove manual select lever nut (1), manual select lever (2) and washer (3).
Use special tool to check that neutral position of transmission range sensor and shift shaft is in correct position as follows.

s2.ptxt: While shift shaft is set to N, insert special tool into shift shaft.
Check that pin (1) of special tool is not misaligned from positioning hole (2) of transmission range sensor, and pin can be inserted smoothly.
If there is a misalignment in Step b), align them by moving transmission range sensor.

s1.ptxt: Tighten transmission range sensor bolts (1) to specified torque.
Install removed parts referring to Transmission Range Sensor Removal and Installation .
Check transmission range sensor for the following points.

item.ptxt: Check that engine starts in P and N ranges but does not start at other than P and N ranges.
Check that back up light turns on when shifting select lever to R range.
Check that shift position indicated in information display is consistent with select lever range.
